description: L-bracket with equal 40mm sides, 20mm width, and 5mm thickness.
notes: The L-bracket should have outer dimensions of exactly 40mm for both legs, 20mm width, and 5mm thickness. This results in a volume of 7500 mm3 (one 40x20x5 mm leg and one 35x20x5 mm leg to avoid double-counting the corner). Position the corner at the origin for clean alignment.
